card_name_verified: Chase Ink Business Preferred® Credit Card
_review_reason: Search results indicate the card's main perks are insurance/protections (cell phone protection up to $1k/claim, trip cancellation up to $5k, rental car) and complimentary DashPass — NOT recurring dollar credits. The DashPass benefit appears promotional/1-year per Chase Sapphire pattern. Cell phone protection is insurance with deductible, not a credit. Confirm with chase.com that there are no statement credits worth listing.
_excluded: Lyft 5x earning (earning rate, not credit; promotional through 9/30/2027)
